title: Mayil Iragae Song Lyrics Anbe Aaruyire
stanzas:
Mayil iragae mayil irage
varudukiraai mella
malai nilave malai nilave
vizhiyil ellaam un ulaa

uyirai thodarndhu varum
neethaane meiyyezhuthu
naan podum kaiezhuthu
anbae.

ulaga mozhiyil varum
ellaame neerazhuthu
kadhal thaan kallezhuthu
anbae..

Mayil Iragaai mayil iragaai
varudugiraai mella.
malai nilave malai nilave
vizhiyil ellaam un ulaa

Madurai podhiyai marandhu
un madiyinil paaindhadhu vaigai
medhuvaa medhuvaa medhuvaa
indha vaigaiyil vaithidu kai

podhigai malaiyai pirindhu
un paarvayil neendhudhu thendral
adhai naan adhai nan pidithu
mella adaithaen mana siraiyil

or ilakkiyam nam kadhal
vaan ulla varai
vaazhum paadal.

Mayil Iragaai mayil iragaai
varudugiraai mella.
malai nilave malai nilave
vizhiyil ellaam un ulaa

uyirai thodarndhu varum
neethaane meiyyezhuthu
naan podum kaiezhuthu
anbae.

ulaga mozhiyil varum
ellaame neerazhuthu
kadhal thaan kallezhuthu
anbae..

Tamizha tamizha tamizha
un tamizh ingu selaiyil varudhaa
amizhdhaai amizhdhaai amizhdhaai
kavi aathida nee varuvaai

ondraa irandaai moondraai
andha valluvan kandadhu muppaal
unakum enakum viruppam
andha moondraam paal allavaa

Mayil iragae mayil irage
varudukiraai mella
malai nilave malai nilave
vizhiyil ellaam un ulaa

uyirai thodarndhu varum
neethaane meiyyezhuthu
naan podum kaiezhuthu
anbae.

ulaga mozhiyil varum
ellaame neerazhuthu
kadhal thaan kallezhuthu
anbae..

Mayil Iragaai mayil iragaai
varudugiraai mella.
malai nilave malai nilave
vizhiyil ellaam un ulaa

seo.title: Mayil Iragae Song Lyrics Anbe Aaruyire
seo.description: Full Mayil Iragae songs lyrics, Anbe Aaruyire Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vaali, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Madhusree, Naresh Iyer.
seo.keywords: Vaali, Anbe Aaruyire, AR Rahman, Madhusree, Naresh Iyer, Mayil Iragae full lyrics, Anbe Aaruyire songs lyrics, Mayil Iragae lyrics snippets, Mayil Iragae WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mayil Iragae lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Mayil Iragae expresses deep feelings of love and longing, beautifully articulated through its lyrics by Vaali.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Anbe Aaruyire, this song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Madhusree and Naresh Iyer, who bring the lyrics to life with their heartfelt rendition.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mayil Iragae was composed by the legendary AR Rahman, known for his innovative and soulful compositions.

When was the song released?

Mayil Iragae was released on September 9, 2005, as part of the film Anbe Aaruyire.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayil Iragae, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the soulful voices of Madhusree and Naresh Iyer. The song encapsulates the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in Anbe Aaruyire. With AR Rahman's enchanting music and Vaali's poignant lyrics, this track evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. It resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayil Iragae from Anbe Aaruyire is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Madhusree and Naresh Iyer, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the soothing melodies that make this track a timeless romantic classic.
stanzaMeanings: The peacock is coming slowly, the moon is shining softly, everything in your eyes is your essence.
You are the one who brings life, I will write the truth with my hands, my dear.
Everything in the world's language is a love letter, my dear, written in the language of love.
The peacock is coming slowly, the moon is shining softly, everything in your eyes is your essence.
Forgetting the beauty of Madurai, I have found it in your embrace, it is a beautiful place, keep it in your hands.
Separating from the beautiful mountain, I am lost in your gaze, the breeze, I hold it gently in my mind's prison.
A poem is our love, living until the sky.
The peacock is coming slowly, the moon is shining softly, everything in your eyes is your essence.
You are the one who brings life, I will write the truth with my hands, my dear.
Everything in the world's language is a love letter, my dear, written in the language of love.
Tamil, Tamil, Tamil, your Tamil is here, it is beautiful, beautiful, beautiful, the poet will come to you.
One, two, three, that poet saw, you and I both like that third milk, isn't it?
You will hear the sounds of the milk flowing, listen to me.
The peacock is coming slowly, the moon is shining softly, everything in your eyes is your essence.
You are the one who brings life, I will write the truth with my hands, my dear.
Everything in the world's language is a love letter, my dear, written in the language of love.
The peacock is coming slowly, the moon is shining softly, everything in your eyes is your essence.
